description: A ground-level photograph depicting an intertidal flat in Étel, Bretagne, France. The foreground shows cracked, muddy ground with numerous small, dry clumps of low-lying vegetation. The mid-ground transitions to a more continuous area of green vegetation, characteristic of saltmarsh or a similar wetland. A narrow strip of water is visible in the far-right background, under a clear, pale blue sky. The image is credited to "© European Union, 2012, LUCAS".
